review_title: Easy tool for video and animation
author: Alfredo D.
pros: One of few tool that let You choose to create a video or animation from text, very important because You can produce different content and create a custom story with thee animation
cons: The editing part is limited and You can't add much things, also the template are poor and a few, resulting generating almost same background
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Simultaneously learn AI and save yourself lots of time!!
description: Saved me a lot of time, I spent multiple days in awe of what I was able to do with Steve.ai, and got a lot of good feedback to the content.
author: Gary G.
pros: Cut the time it takes for my marketing and ad creation down to a fraction of what it would have been. Very high quality content. Highly recommend. Great service, easy to use interface, very impressive!
cons: I don't think the theme system is fully implemented. While boasting a lot of great looking themes, the final product doesn't always keep to that theme. And if you spend your credits to regenerate with a new theme, you may not get what you think you will.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Still waiting for you to update the system and make it more resourceful!
description: I have cancelled my membership over and over because the prices for only 15 downloads are unfair. For the $40 cost, one should at least be able to do 1 video a day. Therefore, SteveAI is unduly expensive. One feels punished for using the service. However, it is easy to operate for most functions.
author: Tammy P.
pros: Characters are lovely. The AI tool is also useful!
cons: There should not be additional charges for props, especially since the characters' actions are limited. Also, how does the two voice capacity work? We can have 2 characters now on a page, but not two voices???
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Feedback for improvement of Steve AI
description: Though there are a few inconveniences, I enjoy my video making progress with Steve AI, especially when the drawbacks could be fixed by using alternative workaround. This is still one of the easiest tool to create an explanatory/ instructional video that I have used
author: Phuong L.
pros: I like the consistency in the use of an animated character to produce an explanatory video. Also, I find the functionality from voice to video interesting and useful in generating a video with my own voice.
cons: There are many functionalities that could have been improved: 1. Character searching: I cannot search for the character by typing the keywords, or character name even though I know the exact same name. The search is either incorrect or does not come back with the result I wanted. I have to scroll up and down to find the character I had chosen earlier in another scene to make it consistent. 2. Character customization: If only the character could be customized more ie., add accessories (hat, gloves, tie), change clothes (dress, shirt) rather than choosing from an existing character. For now, I could only change the character's clothing colours only. Besides, it would be great if user could create a custom character, where they could use all across their projects rather than having to select each character every time they create a new project 3. Action searching: similarly to character searching, action searching is quite user unfriendly. I would appreciate more if there is a function for a frequently used types of action, where I did not have to search, scroll back and forth to find an action I had previously used and wanted to use them again but not so sure where they are/ or which keyword I had used to gain this effect
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Steve-AI is Top Notch for Quick, Easy, and Quality Videos
description: About a year ago (2023), I initially hesitated about purchasing Steve-AI since the Animaker platform worked perfectly for what I desired. However, in testing Steve-AI, my productivity has increased by 75%. I have also purchased outside software to create videos for business and social media platforms. I have found that Animaker and Steve-AI are high-quality, easy to use, and have the quickest video creation results. Customer service has also been proactive and hands-on whenever I encountered a challenge. Great experience thus far!
author: Melissa H.
pros: Steve AI is a high-quality, quick, and easy-to-use platform. If you have your own script, Steve AI will generate a completed video that is functional and easy to modify.
cons: The Steve-AI generated scripts may be relevant to imputed requested information, but they may not be informative or beneficial depending on your desired use.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Steve AI - The perfect tool for adnimated videos with charme
description: With Steve AI we were able to boost our online presence with quick and easy to understand videos of our products and new features while keep our cooperate identity and the cartoon charme.
author: Marvin A.
pros: Steve AI is an easy to use tool to make high qualitiy animations in your own branding. You can easily create advertising for your products, onboarding videos for your team or simply create a "Talking Head" for your company.
cons: This is most likly a luxury problem: In the higher subscription tiers there are so many assets that you sometimes lose sight of the ones you need.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Good, although I had to redo some images and sometimes it took more than 12 hours for the video to be ready for download, but for the rest I like it, I think that because I paid It should have delivered a better finished product.
author: Erico M.
pros: I really like the fact that I can pass a text and Steve.ai does all the animation, very good.
cons: One of the things that leaves me a little disappointed is that when generating some images by AI, they are a little poorly done, missing an arm, a leg or mixing one character with another doing something a little hybrid and several times it was supposed to be a couple of characters. man and woman and they put the same gender, either two women or two men....
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Manobia A.
pros: I recently started using the app (Steve.ai) and so far, I am happy by its features and functionality. It is pretty user friendly and most importantly you can find everything you need to make an animated video at one place and that too quiet easily. It seems developers have put a great deal of thought and effort in it. I highly recommend steve.ai for easy animated videos.
cons: every thing needs improvement otherwise steve.ai is quite amazing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I like to wok Steave AI very much. Because its user friendly and Video create easily. its take output quickly
author: bala K.
pros: Character Animations and Varity of Voice overs
cons: I thought its only vector-based animation. but it is making 2d character animation and amazing voice overs.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Generally good! While there are occasionally bugs, they are quick to reply.
author: Jane F.
pros: I use Steve.ai for all my online courses and find it an easy to use alternative to traditional LMS videos.
cons: There have been a few bugs over time, though whenever I've contacted support they have been responsive.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: it has been a delight, i enjoyed the experience and would recommend to others too
author: Asim R.
pros: prices are reasonable than many other competitors
cons: animations should be more swift or there should be a new mode which creates a fully animated video and not just the pictures
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience with Steve AI has been mostly positive. It's user-friendly and offers a wide range of creative tools. I highly recommend it!
author: Annee S.
pros: I really enjoy using Steve AI. It's incredibly simple and user-friendly, with a fantastic repository of diverse characters and actions to choose from. The platform offers great variety of music, making it versatile for different needs. Their Customer Service Team is excellent—they provide prompt and helpful support.
cons: I experienced severe buffering issues, which cost me nearly 10-15 days. This has made me apprehensive about using the platform for editing and generating super important videos, as I'm concerned about meeting the deadlines set by my department.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good, easy to use. Biggest complaint comes when changing the pre-selected video.
author: Cortney H.
pros: Easy to use, has helped in reducing my time spent on creating video.
cons: I get frustrated when looking for specific stock video or images. 1. I wish I could edit the AI generated filters when searching stock images/videos. 2. I wish I could save or star stock videos or images that I come across and like but not for that segment.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Brilliant. Feel confident using it. Lots of options available.
author: Karen I.
pros: How easy it is to use. The options available, especially as a standard user. Responsiveness of the support team.
cons: Nothing that I've come across yet, so can't put a con.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Ashit, The Dishonest Worker At Steve AI
description: I'm trying to get back my refund of $60 Ashik promised in an email he sent me, they wouldn't deduct. But they deducted anyway. It's been more than a month now, but yesterday Ashit sent me a email saying the don't give refunds because the app is free. Ashit and his colleague promised they were working on me getting my refund, instead of doing the right thing he sent me an email stating he will not give me my refund.
author: Tanya C.
pros: The picture quality was the reason why I when along and got the Pro after they advised me in a meeting to get. With the pro I would get a certain amount of pictures and I would be able to download. Lucky for me I didn't pay them for the entire year. I would have lost more than $60.
cons: 1) The dishonesty. 2) You don't get what you pay for. You don't get anything. 3) They don't keep their words. 4) They claimed to be with Animaker Inc, but when you try to contact someone from there I kept hitting a brick wall .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Steve AI is totally good tool for everyone. Everyone inside Steve AI is so helpful.
author: Ali Riza O.
pros: I like creating videos by using real photos and videos. After seeing Steve AI, I decided to create YouTube channel.
cons: But you dont have enough "free" photos and videos. When i check the premium photos, every premium photos are 5 dollars.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I think Steve AI is fantastic! I can explain products and services effortlessly!

pros: I like that it is seemingly unlimited!!!
cons: It sometimes has glitches where it spins at a point in playback
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

pros: easy to use, and very good interface and easy to understand as beginner
cons: I Still Explore, at this time i don't know any cons

review_title: Steve AI helped me create a professional project!
description: Fantastic AI website with lots of options. Would highly recommend

pros: It's easy to understand and easy to use!
cons: Nothing. Having searched the web for an easy to use system I found Steve AI

description: My overall experience with Steve Ai is the amazing quality of each product of over thousands of things you can do on here. My children Love it, my husband loves it, and I personally Love it the most. I recommended to all of my coworkers.
author: Miabella C.
pros: The thing I liked most about Steve Ai was its Animation and quality of price and animation 10/10.
cons: There was nothing that I Didn't like about Steve Ai everything was amazing, high quality, and perfect.

review_title: Too buggy and not production ready
description: Frustrating to use as its still not production ready.
author: CHETAN A.
pros: The marketing was good and I got hooked.
cons: Buggy and very difficult to use. If u go back it changes the script. It was frustrating to work with the tool. Plus they don't have refund policy. Don't buy such a buggy product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Steve.ai, an AI-driven video editing platform that helps create videos with ease and in just minutes
description: Steve.ai is an ideal solution for businesses that need help creating videos quickly and easily. Video content has always been an effective way to engage customers, but it's often complicated and expensive for small teams to create it themselves. I can attest that Steve makes creating video content less painful by turning text into high-quality audio or visual content in minutes.
author: Brinda C.
pros: When it comes to creating quality video content, many brands face budget and time constraints. Steve.ai is a cutting-edge AI-powered product that helps companies speed up their video creation by automating repetitive tasks. This powerful platform allows users to create stunning visuals without any coding skills or prior video editing experience, delivering results in a fraction of the time and cost of hiring or outsourcing this work. Here's what I love about this product: Steve.ai, an AI-driven video editing platform that helps create videos with ease and in just minutes. Transforms text into engaging visual stories that give you an edge in the growing video content landscape. With pre-built scripts and templates. Steve.ai will automate your most tedious work and free your team to focus on what matters most: creating content that resonates with your audience and drives business results."
cons: Your video content is a key part of your marketing strategy. But creating compelling videos takes time, a lot of editing and money. Steve.ai makes it easy to create professional videos in minutes by turning your text into video automatically or manually. The least appealing aspect of this tool is that it only exists in English. If it had more language options, like French, I would find these tools much more useful and interesting. But it is still good for what it does!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Powerful Tool to turn Texts into Videos Easily
description: A powerful tool to turn any text to a captivating video in very few clicks and minutes. It is ideal for both beginners and professionals looking for means to explain their interests, needs or market their products. Steve ai is beginner friendly in the sense that it offers plenty of features in few clicks at a low price.
author: Mohamed C.
pros: What I like best in "Steve.ai" is its amazing feature to make cartoon or Anime videos in few clicks. Actually, it is a cloud based platform that includes all that streamers and video makers need, particularly the great amount of characters, avatars, scenes and backgrounds. More than that, Steve ai is famous for turning any text into a video; it additionally turns turns any blog post to a video; the fact that makes generating videos an easy task to do on this platform. Steve ai offers many solutions even if you are a biginner.
cons: The videos are ideal for presentations or explainer products as there are limited features to text monitoring; you won't find limited templates for crypto, crafts and jobs for instance.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: It is very good...hope to experiment with many more videos in future.
author: Chandrika J.
pros: Software is easy to use, even for first-timers like me, though I wasted all three free downloads while experimenting! I created a video using photographs that I clicked on my recent visit to New Zealand. The templates provided are good, and the voice-overs are very clear. I would rate it very good for a new software.
cons: Only 3 free downloads! :) Since the people who sign-in are mainly novices and keep experimenting, three downloads finish fast. Please make it at least 5. Also, instead of monthly/ yearly plans, you can offer pay-per-download plans :)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Perfect for some use cases, missing features for others
description: I've had some good experiences with it, would recommend at least to try and check if it fits your needs.
author: Nir G.
pros: Converting a script to video is seamless, as long as the chosen videos fit the theme. In generic sales categories it works well.
cons: Once you start customizing your video (e.g. changing stock videos, music, narration) the experience gets a bit slower and more frustrating. Bugs with the text engine or the inability to change text over longer form of a video.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years
